headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Favored at Goldman Amid the Middle East Crisis
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is among the 14 Best Oil and Gas Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. headline: Double, Double, Oil and Trouble: Crude Hits $116 and Here’s What It Means
summary: Crude oil is sitting at $116 per barrel right now, and for the energy sector, that number carries significant weight. The last time Brent crude touched this level was March 2022, when it hit $117.25 in the wake of the Russia-Ukraine invasion. Before that, you have to go back to 2011 and 2012 to find ...
